description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a large rectangular green plot, surrounded by a low fence. The structure features clean, geometric lines with a flat roof and a prominent central section flanked by lower wings. A rectangular swimming pool is situated on one side of the property, bordered by a paved area and landscaping. The main entrance is accentuated by a small overhang, and the property is enclosed by a perimeter fence with shrubbery. Windows are arranged in a linear, asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor space and a minimalist architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a swimming pool, landscaped yard, and perimeter fencing, featuring clean lines and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central structure, and the swimming pool to the left, with the full width of the property visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bungalow, the pool area, and the landscaped boundary along the length of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, the pool on the right, and the extended green yard with fencing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the length of the bungalow, the pool area, and the rear landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with linear side and front windows
